tldr_zh: ChatGPT 記憶功能升級，OpenAI 關注生物防禦，Anthropic 營收強勁，科技巨頭積極佈局 AI 應用與安全。
tldr_en: ChatGPT enhances memory, OpenAI focuses on biodefense, Anthropic shows strong revenue, and tech giants accelerate AI applications and security.

items.title_zh: ChatGPT 推出記憶功能，提升跨對話情境理解與個人化體驗
items.title_en: ChatGPT Introduces Memory System for Enhanced Cross-Conversation Context
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 為 ChatGPT 導入全新記憶系統，使其能更好地記住用戶偏好，並在不同對話間保持情境連貫性。這項功能旨在提供更個人化且實用的互動體驗，減少重複資訊輸入的需求。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has rolled out a new memory system for ChatGPT, enabling it to better recall user preferences and maintain context across various conversations. This feature aims to provide a more personalized and helpful interaction, reducing the need for repetitive information input.

items.title_zh: OpenAI 發布「智慧時代生物防禦」行動計畫，應對 AI 生物風險
items.title_en: OpenAI Unveils "Biodefense in the Intelligence Age" Action Plan for AI Biological Risks
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 發表了一項名為「智慧時代生物防禦」的行動計畫，旨在應對由 AI 技術可能帶來的生物安全風險。該計畫強調建立 AI 驅動的生物韌性，以預防和減輕潛在的生物威脅。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has released an action plan titled "Biodefense in the Intelligence Age," addressing potential biological security risks posed by AI technology. The plan emphasizes building AI-powered biological resilience to prevent and mitigate potential bio-threats.

items.title_zh: 法院應對 AI 生成訴訟浪潮，挑戰司法系統與法律程序
items.title_en: Courts Grapple with Influx of AI-Generated Lawsuits, Challenging Judicial Systems
items.summary_zh: 隨著越來越多由 AI 生成的訴訟文件湧入，美國法院正努力應對這股新浪潮。這對司法系統構成挑戰，尤其是在處理無律師代理的案件時，需要仔細審查這些 AI 輔助的法律文件。
items.summary_en: US courts are struggling to cope with a rising tide of AI-generated lawsuits, posing significant challenges to the judicial system. This situation demands careful scrutiny of AI-assisted legal documents, particularly in cases involving self-represented litigants.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 營收飆升至 470 億美元，IPO 前展現強勁成長動能
items.title_en: Anthropic's Revenue Soars to $47 Billion, Showing Strong Growth Ahead of IPO
items.summary_zh: 在首次公開募股（IPO）前夕，AI 公司 Anthropic 宣布其年化營收已突破 470 億美元，較去年底的 90 億美元大幅增長。這顯示了該公司在 AI 領域的快速擴張與強勁市場需求。
items.summary_en: Ahead of its initial public offering (IPO), AI company Anthropic announced that its annualized revenue has surged past $47 billion, a significant increase from approximately $9 billion at the end of 2025. This demonstrates the company's rapid expansion and strong market demand in the AI sector.

items.title_zh: Anthropic 發布開源框架，利用 AI 協助發現程式碼漏洞
items.title_en: Anthropic Releases Open-Source Framework for AI-Powered Vulnerability Discovery
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出一個開源框架，旨在利用人工智慧來協助發現程式碼中的安全漏洞。此舉有助於提升軟體開發的安全性，並促進 AI 在資安領域的應用與研究。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has launched an open-source framework designed to leverage artificial intelligence for discovering vulnerabilities in code. This initiative aims to enhance software development security and promote the application and research of AI in cybersecurity.

items.title_zh: Meta 升級 AI 客服機器人為 Business Agent，擴大支援 Instagram 商家
items.title_en: Meta Upgrades AI Customer Service to Business Agent, Expanding Support for Instagram Merchants
items.summary_zh: Meta 在倫敦的 Conversations 2026 大會上宣布，將其 AI 客服機器人升級為 Meta Business Agent，並將支援範圍擴大至 Instagram 商家。這項服務將在 WhatsApp、Instagram 和 Messenger 上自動回覆顧客訊息，協助企業處理客服、銷售等業務。
items.summary_en: At the Conversations 2026 conference in London, Meta announced the upgrade of its AI customer service bot to Meta Business Agent, extending its support to Instagram merchants. This service will automatically respond to customer messages on WhatsApp, Instagram, and Messenger, assisting businesses with customer service, sales, and other operations.

items.title_zh: Apple 批准 Poke 為首個 AI 代理，進駐 Messages for Business 平台
items.title_en: Apple Approves Poke as First AI Agent on Messages for Business Platform
items.summary_zh: 新創公司 Poke 成為首個獲 Apple 批准，可在其 Messages for Business 平台上運作的 AI 代理。這意味著用戶將能透過簡單的文字訊息，在 Apple 的商業通訊環境中使用 AI 代理服務。
items.summary_en: Startup Poke has become the first AI agent approved by Apple to operate on its Messages for Business platform. This development allows users to interact with AI agents through simple text messages within Apple's business communication ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Airbnb 執行長 Brian Chesky 規劃成立全新 AI 實驗室
items.title_en: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky Plans to Launch New AI Lab
items.summary_zh: Airbnb 執行長 Brian Chesky 透露，公司正計畫成立一個全新的 AI 實驗室。他曾表示，現有的 LLM 產品尚未完全符合 Airbnb 的需求，此舉顯示 Airbnb 期望透過內部研發，打造更符合其業務情境的 AI 解決方案。
items.summary_en: Airbnb CEO Brian Chesky has revealed plans to launch a new AI lab. He previously stated that existing LLM products weren't quite ready for Airbnb's specific needs, indicating the company's intent to develop tailored AI solutions through in-house research.

items.title_zh: 美國最高法院裁定 AT&T 與 Verizon 敗訴，維持出售位置數據罰款
items.title_en: US Supreme Court Rules Against AT&T and Verizon on Location Data Fines
items.summary_zh: 美國最高法院以 8 比 1 的裁決，判決 AT&T 和 Verizon 在出售用戶位置數據的案件中敗訴，維持了對其處以罰款的決定。法院認為，聯邦通訊委員會（FCC）並未侵犯電信業者獲得陪審團審判的權利。
items.summary_en: The US Supreme Court, in an 8-1 ruling, sided against AT&T and Verizon, upholding fines imposed for selling user location data. The court determined that the Federal Communications Commission (FCC) did not violate the carriers' right to a jury trial.

items.title_zh: Let's Encrypt 規劃 2027 年建立後量子憑證架構，強化網路安全
items.title_en: Let's Encrypt Plans Post-Quantum Certificate Architecture by 2027 for Enhanced Web Security
items.summary_zh: 免費憑證簽發機構 Let's Encrypt 宣布，計畫在 2027 年前建立可供生產使用的後量子憑證架構，以 Merkle Tree Certificates (MTC) 作為主要方案。此舉旨在為未來的量子計算威脅做好準備，確保網路通訊的長期安全性。
items.summary_en: Let's Encrypt, a free certificate authority, announced plans to establish a production-ready post-quantum certificate architecture by 2027, primarily utilizing Merkle Tree Certificates (MTC). This initiative aims to prepare for future quantum computing threats and ensure the long-term security of web communications.

items.title_zh: 馬斯克再次試圖擺脫 FTC 對 X 資料處理的審計
items.title_en: Elon Musk Again Attempts to Evade FTC Audits of X's Data Handling
items.summary_zh: 根據報導，Elon Musk 再次嘗試避免聯邦貿易委員會（FTC）對 X（前 Twitter）資料處理方式的審計。公眾評論員警告 FTC，馬斯克可能無法被信任來保護 X 用戶的隱私。
items.summary_en: Reports indicate that Elon Musk is once again attempting to avoid Federal Trade Commission (FTC) audits regarding X's (formerly Twitter) data handling practices. Public commentators have warned the FTC that Musk cannot be trusted to protect X user privacy.
